/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -O1 -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fysics-process.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/fysics-process.dir/tools/fysics_process_main.c.o" -o fysics-process  libfysics.a -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/15/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
